item.title: Just became a father to the most beautiful baby girl. Hospital didn\u2019t let me spend the night with her and my wife so now I\u2019m home and can\u2019t sleep. Wish my luck on this Wednesdsy my dudes

item.title: Unfortunately, Shrek 5 was made during the most toxic era of cinema, so be prepared to see a lot of shit and be disappointed. I don't even need to watch it to know that the film's story is about Shrek being a conservative who needs to accept his LGBTQ+ and woke daughter.
item.description: Unfortunately, Shrek 5 was made during the most toxic era of cinema, so be prepared to see a lot of shit and be disappointed. I don't even need to watch it to know that the film's story is about Shrek being a conservative who needs to accept his LGBTQ+ and woke daughter.

item.description: Latvian passport under UV light

item.title: In Ireland people touch the breast on the statue of Molly Malone because it's said to bring good luck. Feminists campaign to stop what they call a \u201cmisogynistic tradition\u201d. This made me think of when C. Proudman also complained and people then answered with these pictures.
item.description: In Ireland people touch the breast on the statue of Molly Malone because it's said to bring good luck. Feminists campaign to stop what they call a \u201cmisogynistic tradition\u201d. This made me think of when C. Proudman also complained and people then answered with these pictures.

item.title: My Son Found His First Favorite Stick... Let\u2019s Prove to My Wife That This Is a Big Deal.
